issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://m.twitch.tv/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fm.twitch.tv%2F) ### Comment > When watching VODs on Twitch using the Samsung browser, ads will occasionally interrupt the video. This did not happen last year with AdGuard installed. Some time early this year, ads stared to appear again. No settings were changed manually, and I've verified that everything is enabled. > > I am using a Galaxy Tab S5e, and that was still the case back when ads were being blocked. > > Note: I don't know how to find information for most of the "Settings" part of this report.
